Interactive Learning Guide

How o9 Works

From the fundamental building blocks of a supply chain network to live scenario simulation — a guided tour of the o9 Solutions platform.

Start from the beginning Explore chapters
4 chapters 35 topics 3 interactive simulations

Chapters

Pick a chapter to jump in, or start from the beginning to follow the full learning path.

01

Understanding the Basics

Learn the fundamental building blocks of any supply chain network: the elements that every planning model is built from.

6 topics
Open chapter
02

The Network

How the building blocks connect into a live supply chain graph — nodes, edges, and the Digital Brain.

11 topics
Open chapter
03

Data Flow: Demand

How a customer forecast travels upstream through the network — from finished good back to raw material inputs.

4 topics
Open chapter
04

Data Flow: Supply

How planned orders and inventory flow downstream through the network — from raw material inputs to the customer.

4 topics
Open chapter
05

The Logic

How the o9 planning engine turns network data into optimized, constrained supply plans.

5 topics
Open chapter
06

The Simulation

Run what-if scenarios, stress-test your plan, and see how the supply chain responds to change.

5 topics
Open chapter
